name: Stir-Fried Diced Chicken with Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breast on a slant and pat it flat using the flat side of a Chinese cleaver.
2. Dice the chicken, rinse the cabbage, remove hard stems, and cut into 3/8-inch squares.
3. Remove the skin from the fried peanuts and crush them to small granules.
4. Rinse the chilies and mince them.
5. Heat oil in a wok.
6. Fry the diced chicken and cabbage briefly until the chicken changes color. Set aside 3 tablespoons of oil in the wok.
7. Stir fry Chili Nam Yuey for a few seconds, then add the remaining ingredients (diced chicken, cabbage, crushed peanuts, minced chilies, and salt).
8. Mix well and stir fry until everything is combined.
9. Remove from heat and serve.
Note: Szechuan pickled cabbage and chilies can be used to replace cabbage and chilies for enhanced flavor. For banquets, pine seeds can substitute the peanuts.
